# SIDRA VS Code Workspace

This folder contains the recommended Visual Studio Code configuration
for the SIDRA production repository.

## Included Files

.vscode/
│
├── extensions.json
├── launch.json
├── settings.json
├── snippets.code-snippets
├── tasks.json
└── README.md

## Recommended Extensions

- ESLint
- Prettier
- Tailwind CSS IntelliSense
- TypeScript
- Firebase Explorer
- GitLens
- GitHub Actions
- Error Lens
- Path IntelliSense

## Debug Profiles

- SIDRA • Next.js
- SIDRA • Production
- SIDRA • Firebase Emulator

## Build Tasks

- Development Server
- Production Build
- Type Check
- ESLint
- Firebase Emulator
- Production Check

## Formatting

- LF Line Endings
- UTF-8 Encoding
- 2 Space Indentation
- Prettier
- ESLint Auto Fix

## Notes

Do not modify workspace settings unless required for production.

All project source code should remain outside the `.vscode` folder.

SIDRA Engineering Standard v1.0
